---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve. What is the current workaround, and why is it insufficient?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your ideal solution. Include any specific behavior, UI changes, or API changes you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe a real-world scenario where this feature would be useful.

## Additional Context

Any screenshots, mockups, or references to similar features in other tools.
